_comment: Shared interoperability vector for the SenseVoice WS HMAC token (audience sensevoice-ws-v2). Backend (backend/app/security/sensevoice_token.py) and SenseVoice (sensevoice/sensevoice_token.py) each implement the SAME compact HMAC-SHA256 scheme but MUST NOT import each other (separate Docker contexts). Both test suites assert against this file to prevent protocol drift. Secret and token here are TEST-ONLY; never a real secret.
algorithm: token = base64url(canonical_json_payload) + '.' + base64url(HMAC_SHA256(secret, signing_input)); canonical_json = json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')); base64url is unpadded.
